payload.summary: Meta-review gate opened for bubble document_first round 2. Submit result through structured CLI: pairflow agent emit --kind meta_review_result --repo <repo> --bubble-id document_first --handoff-id <handoff-id> --execution-id <execution-id> --round 2 --recommendation <approve|rework|inconclusive> --summary "<summary>" [--rework-target-message "<message>"] --report-json '{"findings_claim_state":"clean|open_findings|unknown","findings_claim_source":"meta_review_artifact","findings_count":<int>,"findings_claimed_open_total":<int>,"findings_blocking_open_total":<int>,"findings_advisory_open_total":<int>,"findings_artifact_ref":"artifacts/<findings>.json","meta_review_run_id":"<run-id>","findings_digest_sha256":"<sha256>","findings_artifact_status":"available"}'.
